pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh: Creates exactly 7 HasFriend edges via CREATE EDGE statements (lines 22, 25, 28-29, 32, 35-36)
Arithmetic: 7 initial edges + 3 missing reverse pairs = 10 total edges after repair
setup_task.sh line 22 creates john.smith->maria.garcia; maria.garcia->john.smith is missing reverse
setup_task.sh line 22 creates john.smith->maria.garcia; maria.garcia->john.smith is the required reverse edge
setup_task.sh line 25 creates david.jones->sophie.martin; sophie.martin->david.jones is missing reverse
setup_task.sh line 25 creates david.jones->sophie.martin; sophie.martin->david.jones is the required reverse edge
setup_task.sh line 32 creates yuki.tanaka->james.brown; james.brown->yuki.tanaka is missing reverse
setup_task.sh line 32 creates yuki.tanaka->james.brown; james.brown->yuki.tanaka is the required reverse edge

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are correct. The task uses 7 synthetic HasFriend edges created in OrientDB demodb: 3 asymmetric pairs (John->Maria, David->Sophie, Yuki->James) and 2 control group symmetric pairs (Luca<->Anna, Emma<->Carlos). The task requires creating exactly 3 missing reverse edges to achieve full bidirectional symmetry, resulting in 10 total edges. The data is synthetic with fictional profiles using example.com email addresses.
